h1.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, left-aligned, significantly larger than body text with generous spacing above and below.

visual_matchers.pattern: First-line indentation on paragraphs following the initial paragraph of a section.
Parenthetical references containing a name and a four-digit year, e.g., (Camagay 1998).

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header at the top of the page containing the page number and author names (e.g., '8 Encinas Franco and Laguna') in a smaller, lighter sans-serif font.
